name: Bug Flare (Stage 1)
description: A luminescent insectoid entity that feeds on solar radiation. Its bio-luminescent thorax pulses with burning thermal energy.
originLore: Born within solar nebulae, Bug Flare Stage 1 swarms near star surfaces, harvesting light energy into solid chitin armor.

lore.celestialConcordance: Bug Flare Stage 1 acts as cosmic pollinators, transferring solar particles between stellar flower clouds.

quantumResonators.name: Bioluminescent Flash
quantumResonators.description: Emits a blinding burst of heat and light that disorients aggressors.

quantumResonators.name: Flame Chitin
quantumResonators.description: Hardens its outer shell into molten armor, reflecting physical impacts.
